Question: Identify all discontinuities for the following functions as either a jump or a removable discontinuity. ⓐ $$f ( x ) = \frac{x^{2} - 6 x}{x - 6}$$ ⓑ $$g ( x ) = \{ \left .\begin{matrix}{aa}\sqrt{x} , & 0 \le x < 4 \\ 2 x , & x \geq 4\end{matrix}\right .$$
Answer: ⓐ removable discontinuity at $$x = 6 ;$$ ⓑ jump discontinuity at $$x = 4$$

Question: Determine whether the function $$f ( x ) = \{ \left .\begin{matrix}{aa}\frac{1}{x} , & x \le 2 \\ 9 x - 11.5 , & x > 2\end{matrix}\right .$$ is continuous at $$x = 2.$$
Answer: No. The function is not continuous at $$x = 2$$ because the left hand limit is $$\frac{1}{2}$$ and the right hand limit is $$6 . 5$$ .

Question: Determine whether the function $$f ( x ) = \frac{9 - x^{2}}{x^{2} - 3 x}$$ is continuous at $$x = 3.$$ If not, state the type of discontinuity.
Answer: No, the function is not continuous at $$x = 3.$$ There exists a removable discontinuity at $$x = 3.$$

Question: Determine where the function $$f \left(\right. x \left.\right) = \left{\right. \frac{\pi x}{4} , x < 2 \\ \frac{\pi}{x} , \textrm{ }\textrm{ }\textrm{ }\textrm{ } 2 \leq x \leq 6 \\ 2 \pi x , x > 6$$ is discontinuous.
